subject: test sample
text:
Dear Support Team,

I wanted to follow up on my previous message about the application performance issues. It's been a few days and the dashboard is still experiencing significant slowdowns. I've noticed that the issue seems to be worse during peak hours (10 AM - 2 PM).

Could you please provide an update on the investigation? The slow performance is affecting our team's productivity.

Best regards,
John
html:
Dear Support Team,

I wanted to follow up on my previous message about the application performance issues. It's been a few days and the dashboard is still experiencing significant slowdowns. I've noticed that the issue seems to be worse during peak hours (10 AM - 2 PM).

Could you please provide an update on the investigation? The slow performance is affecting our team's productivity.

Best regards,
John
